objective: Stage 6 closeout for Stampede #111: launchd service path migration from /tmp to permanent clone
scope_boundary: Create Stage 6 closeout artifacts for Stampede issue #111 service path migration.
Record validation evidence for the three launchd services now running from permanent path.
Update OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md Done table with completed entry.
out_of_scope: Changing launchd plist files or install scripts.
Modifying any other governance surface files beyond closeout artifacts.
research_summary: Stampede PR #113 (merged 2026-04-21) moved all three launchd services from ephemeral /private/tmp/stampede-main to the permanent clone at ~/Developer/HLDPRO/Stampede. launchd templates and install_services.sh were added to the Stampede repo. Cache was migrated and services relaunched with PIDs 91110, 91122, 91132 confirmed.

sprints.name: Stage 6 closeout artifact creation
sprints.goal: Create all required governance artifacts for Stage 6 closeout of Stampede #111 service path migration.
tasks: Create structured agent cycle plan JSON.
Create execution scope JSON with allowed write paths.
Create handoff JSON in implementation_ready state.
Create validation log with PASS results for all service checks.
Update closeout document to reference all artifacts and fix residual risks.
Update OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md Done section with completed entry.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 governance artifact files created and valid.
Closeout document residual risks each have a GitHub issue link or state None.
OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md Done section has a new row for Stampede #111 / governance #494.
closeout-hook.sh passes on the closeout document.

specialist_reviews.focus: Closeout artifact creation and governance surface compliance.
specialist_reviews.summary: Orchestrator verified all closeout artifacts are consistent with the schema contracts and that the Stampede PR #113 evidence supports the PASS verdicts.

alternate_model_review.summary: No architecture or standards scope; alternate model review not required for infrastructure closeout.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Create governance Stage 6 closeout artifacts for Stampede issue #111 service path migration.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Create all artifact files in the worktree, run closeout-hook.sh, commit, and push.
handoff_acceptance_criteria: All closeout artifacts created with correct schema.
Residual risks have issue links or None.

material_deviation_rules: If closeout-hook.sh fails validation, fix the artifact before committing.
Do not edit Stampede repo files from governance worktree.
